target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Roof and upper floors show extensive structural collapse; facade is heavily damaged with missing sections; debris is visible at base; damage appears consistent with 45-75% of target element area affected.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Multiple windows and balconies are blown out; facade shows significant structural degradation; roofline is damaged; visible debris and partial collapse of external elements consistent with 45-75% damage to non-load-bearing elements.

target_2.brief_supporting_logic: Vehicle is unrecognizable; chassis and body are severely mangled, engine compartment is exposed and fragmented, and all structural integrity is lost.

summary: Three targets assessed: two buildings with SEVERE DAMAGE (one CONFIRMED, one PROBABLE) and one military vehicle DESTROYED (CONFIRMED). The scene depicts a residential area with multiple multi-story buildings showing extensive structural damage and debris, alongside a destroyed vehicle in a grassy yard. The assessed damage suggests significant functional impairment of the buildings and complete loss of the vehicle’s operational capability.
